meta.name: Nordic Home
meta.description: A clean, functional home goods e-commerce store with a modular grid layout. Features extensive use of lifestyle imagery, clear pricing, and prominent promotional badging in a highly structured, dense format.

header.notes: The screenshot only shows a very thin dark top bar with utility links (language, postal code, store selector). The main navigation header with logo and cart is not visible in this capture.

footer.notes: Footer is not visible in the screenshot.

productCard.notes: Cards have a white or light grey background, square images. Very information-dense with title, description, price (often with larger whole numbers and smaller decimals), prominent red or blue badges (New, Clearance, Offers), review stars, and circular icon buttons for add-to-cart (blue background) and heart/save. Swatches available under some products.

productGrid.notes: Heavy use of horizontal scrolling carousels rather than wrapped grids. Carousels have prominent black circular arrow buttons extending over the right edge.

featuredProducts.heading: Today's best deals
featuredProducts.notes: Features filter pills (Clearance, Offers) above the grid. Cards show original price crossed out and new red price.

design.styling: Very slim height, icons next to text labels

content.cta: Utility links: Language, postal code entry, store selector

design.styling: Thin bar with an icon and text link, subtle bottom border

sections.name: category-quick-links

design.styling: Square light grey cards with cutout product images and text below. Circular next arrow button.

media.description: Cutout images of generic product categories (storage, outdoor, kitchen).
media.position: Centered in grey square above text

content.items: Array of category objects with an image and label.

sections.notes: Quick visual navigation to main product categories.

sections.name: hero-grid
sections.layout: CSS Grid: One large left column, stacked right columns (split into 3 smaller blocks)

design.styling: Full-bleed images within grid cells, gap between cells. Gradients at bottom of images to ensure text legibility.

content.headline: Promotional offers on categories
content.cta: Arrow icons functioning as links on the bottom right of each image block

media.description: Lifestyle room settings showing furniture and decor in use.

content.specialElements: Blue and orange rectangular badges in top left of some images.

sections.notes: Asymmetrical mosaic grid layout for high visual impact.

sections.name: offers-carousel
sections.layout: Horizontal carousel with introductory text block followed by product cards

design.styling: First item is a solid blue block with text and button, followed by standard product/offer cards.

content.headline: Introductory text for a specific member program
content.cta: Circular outline button with arrow icon in the blue block

media.description: Lifestyle and product images corresponding to offers.

content.specialElements: Solid blue promo card as the first item in the carousel.

sections.notes: Mixes a solid color CTA block with image-based offer cards in the same carousel.

sections.name: promotional-banner

design.styling: Large padding, bold typography, simple layout

content.headline: Large bold promotional statement about an event/day
content.body: Asterisked explanatory paragraph about the promotion details.
content.cta: Circular white outline button with arrow icon

sections.notes: High contrast interruption in the flow to highlight a specific program.

sections.name: deals-carousel
sections.layout: Section with heading, filter pills, and a horizontal carousel of product cards

design.text: Dark text, red text for sale prices
design.styling: Standard dense product cards with red 'Clearance' or black 'Last chance' badges.

content.headline: Section title for deals
content.cta: Filter pill buttons above the carousel. Circular blue cart add buttons on cards.

media.description: Cutout product images on white backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Red pricing text showing original vs new price, star ratings.

sections.name: trending-carousel

design.styling: Square image cards with brief text below. 'New' orange badges.

media.description: Quirky, colorful lifestyle or stylized product shots.

sections.notes: More editorial feel compared to standard product cards.

sections.name: new-arrivals-carousel
sections.layout: Section with heading, 'View all' button, and horizontal carousel

design.styling: Dense product cards with 'New' text above brand name.

content.headline: Section title for new products
content.cta: Outline pill button 'View all' next to heading. Blue circular cart buttons on cards.

media.description: Cutout product images on white backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Some cards show color/material swatches below the main info.

sections.name: room-inspiration-carousel
sections.layout: Horizontal carousel with heading and 'View all' button

design.styling: Square lifestyle images with room category names below.

content.headline: Inspirational section heading
content.cta: Outline pill button 'View all'. Arrow icons next to category names.

media.description: Styled room sets showing products in context (bedroom, kitchen, living room).

sections.name: shop-the-look
sections.layout: Three tall portrait images side-by-side filling width

design.text: Dark text on floating product cards
design.styling: Tall lifestyle images with interactive hotspots (circular buttons) that open floating product detail cards.

content.headline: Section title and subtitle
content.cta: Circular hotspot buttons on the images.

media.description: Tall portrait lifestyle images showing organized closets and rooms.
media.position: Side by side filling the container

content.specialElements: Floating white product card hovering over an image, pointing to a hotspot.

sections.name: gift-ideas-carousel

design.styling: Solid white square cards with text in the center and arrow icon.

content.headline: Section title for gift ideas
content.cta: Circular outline button with arrow in the cards.
content.items: Array of text-only cards for different gift recipient categories.

sections.notes: Text-based navigational cards instead of image-based.

design.styling: Cards with large lifestyle images, bold headline, and short excerpt.

content.headline: Section title for articles
content.cta: Circular outline button with arrow below excerpt.

media.description: Editorial style lifestyle photography (under stairs storage, food styling).

sections.name: sustainability-carousel

design.text: Dark text on grey, dark text on green
design.styling: Mix of a solid green introductory card and light grey text cards.

content.headline: Section title for sustainability ideas
content.items: Array of text-only navigation cards, starting with a green featured card.

sections.layout: Grid of square images with heading and subtitle
